title: alansmia reclinata
intro: Alansmia reclinata, also known as the climbing spleenwort or reclinata, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Alansmia reclinata is often used in infusions or decoctions, as well as in the form of tinctures or dried extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
